---
title: "Weekly Cargo Cleaning"
author: "Sakina Lord"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("~/Desktop/478C_Capstone/CAPPY/Data"))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
```

# load data
```{r}
# Grab all weekly fies from directory
files <- list.files(path = "./Rail_Service_Data/", pattern = "\\.xlsx$")

# initialize an empty file for them all to read into
weekly_cargo_data <- tibble()

for  (i in 1:length(files)){
  print(i)
  filename = paste("./Rail_Service_Data/" , files[i], sep = '')
  print(filename)
  if(str_detect(filename, "%")){
      company <- str_extract(filename, "[A-Z]{2,}")
      
      if(company != "UP"){
  
        week <- str_extract(filename, "\\d{4}_\\d{2}_\\d{2}") %>%
          str_replace_all("_", "-") %>% as.Date("%Y-%m-%d")
        
        print.Date(week, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
        year <- as.numeric(format(week, "%Y"))
        
        print(paste(c("reading", week, company), sep = " "))
  
        if (company == "CN" && (week != as.Date("2025-09-03", format = "%Y-%m-%d"))) {
          range <- "B9:E31"}
        else{
          if(company == "NS" && (week == as.Date("2021-06-30")))
            {
            range <- "B14:E36"
            }
          else {range <- "B8:E30"}
        }
          
      # Read based on file range
          temp <- read_xlsx(filename,
                          sheet = 5,
                          range = range)
        print(head(temp))
  
        temp <- temp %>% mutate(Year = year,
                                Week = week,
                                Company = company)
        weekly_cargo_data <- rbind(temp, weekly_cargo_data)
      }
  }
  else {print("File not of correct format, skipping")}
}

```


UP has a different file format, so rbind a bit differently
```{r}
# Grab all file names with UP
getwd()
UP_files <- list.files(path = "./Rail_Service_Data/", pattern = "^UP%20Data%.*\\.xlsx$")
commodity_groups <- read.csv("~/Desktop/478C_Capstone/CAPPY/Data/commodity_groups.csv")

range <- "B7:D31"

#weekly_cargo_data_TEMP <- tibble()

for (i in 1:length(UP_files)){
  filename = paste("./Rail_Service_Data/" , UP_files[i], sep = '')
  print(filename)
  print(i)
  if(str_detect(filename, "%")){
      company <- "UP"

      week <- str_extract(filename, "\\d{4}_\\d{2}_\\d{2}") %>%
        str_replace_all("_", "-") %>% as.Date("%Y-%m-%d")
      
      print.Date(week, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
      year <- as.numeric(format(week, "%Y"))
      
      print(paste(c("reading", week, company), sep = " "))
      
      temp <- read_xlsx(filename,
                              sheet = 6,
                              range = range)

      
      if(!('Cars Originated' %in% names(temp))){
        # Re-read in temp
        temp <- read_xlsx(filename,
                              sheet = 5,
                              range = "B8:E30")
        print("NORMAL FILE FORMAT")
      }
      else{
        print("SPECIAL FILE FORMAT")
        temp <- temp %>% mutate(Commodity = str_to_lower(Commodity))
        temp <- left_join(temp, commodity_groups, 
                  by = c("Commodity" = "Original_Name")) %>%
        rename(Originated = `Cars Originated`,
               Received = `Cars Interchanged`,
               `Commodity Group` = Standard_Name,
               `Commodity Group Code` = Code) %>%
          select(`Commodity Group`, `Commodity Group Code`,
                 Originated, Received)
      }
      temp <- temp %>% mutate(Year = year,
               Week = week,
               Company = company)
      
      print(head(temp))
      print(paste(c("Ncol: ", ncol(temp))))
      weekly_cargo_data <- rbind(temp, weekly_cargo_data)
  }
  else {print("File not of correct format, skipping")}
}



```
```{r}
# Grab all file names with UP
UP_files <- list.files(path = "./Rail_Service_Data/", pattern = "^UP%20Data%.*\\.xlsx$")
commodity_groups <- read.csv("~/Desktop/478C_Capstone/CAPPY/Data/commodity_groups.csv")
i = 1
range <- "B7:D31"

weekly_cargo_data_TEMP <- tibble()

  filename = paste("./Rail_Service_Data/" , UP_files[i], sep = '')
  print(filename)
  print(i)
  if(str_detect(filename, "%")){
      company <- "UP"

      week <- str_extract(filename, "\\d{4}_\\d{2}_\\d{2}") %>%
        str_replace_all("_", "-") %>% as.Date("%Y-%m-%d")
      
      print.Date(week, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
      year <- as.numeric(format(week, "%Y"))
      
      print(paste(c("reading", week, company), sep = " "))
      
      temp <- read_xlsx(filename,
                              sheet = 6,
                              range = range)

      
      if(!('Cars Originated' %in% names(temp))){
        # Re-read in temp
        temp <- read_xlsx(filename,
                              sheet = 5,
                              range = "B8:E30")
      }
      else{
        print("In else loop")
        print(head(temp))
        print(head())
        temp <- left_join(temp, commodity_groups, 
                  by = c("Commodity" = "Original_Name")) %>%
        rename(Originated = `Cars Originated`,
               Received = `Cars Interchanged`,
               `Commodity Group` = Commodity) %>%
          select(-Standard_Name)
      }
      temp <- temp %>% mutate(Year = year,
               Week = week,
               Company = company)
      
      print(head(temp))
      print(paste(c("Ncol: ", ncol(temp))))
      weekly_cargo_data_TEMP <- rbind(temp, weekly_cargo_data_TEMP) }
```


```{r}
weekly_cargo_data_joined <- weekly_cargo_data %>% mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_to_title(`Commodity Group`)) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "And", "&")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "Prods", "Products")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "^Motor Vehicles & Equip$", "Motor Vehicles & Equipment")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "^Crushed Stone$", "Crushed Stone, Sand & Gravel")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "^Farm Products Except Grain$", "Farm Products")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "^Metals$", "Metal Products")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "^Non Metallic Minerals$", "Nonmetallic Minerals")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "^Pulp, Paper & Allied Products$", "Pulp & Paper Products")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "^Stone, Clay & Glass Products", "Stone, Clay, Glass")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "^Waste & Scrap Materials$", "Waste & Other Scrap")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = str_replace_all(`Commodity Group`, "^Other Carloads$", "All Other")) %>%
  mutate(`Commodity Group` = as.factor(`Commodity Group`), 
         `Commodity Group Code` = as.factor(`Commodity Group Code`), 
         Originated = as.numeric(Originated), 
         Received = as.numeric(Received), 
         Year = as.numeric(Year), 
         Company = as.factor(Company))

# combos <- weekly_cargo_data_joined %>% mutate(combos = paste(`Commodity Group Code`, `Commodity Group`, sep = "-")) 
# sort(unique(combos$`Commodity Group`))
# sort(unique(combos$combos))
```


```{r}
# Export
dir.create("cleaned_weekly_data")
write.csv(weekly_cargo_data_joined, file = "cleaned_weekly_data/Weekly_Cargo_Data_2020_2026_all_data.csv")
saveRDS(weekly_cargo_data_joined, "cleaned_weekly_data/weekly_cargo_data.rds")
```
